name: SpinningCoin
author: xXKHaLeD098Xx
description: This is a simple PMMP plugin to create a spinning coin telling players how much coins they have!
readme_markdown:
# SpinningCoin This is a simple PMMP plugin to create a spinning coin telling players how much coins they have! ![SpinningCoin](https://github.com/xXKHaLeD098Xx/SpinningCoin/blob/master/SpinningCoin.gif) ## Usage NOTE: Commands only work with OPs
Spawn the spinning coin: __/spinningcoin spawn__
Removing the spinning coin: stand near it and execute: __/spinningcoin remove__ ## Config in __config.yml__ you can edit the nametag format ## Contacts If you found a bug or have a question contact me on discord: __кнαℓє∂#7787__
